/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 CMakeFiles/client.dir/Kclient.cc.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/__/user.pb.cc.o -o ../../../bin/client   -L/root/Krpc-all/Krpc/thirdparty/muduo-cpp17/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/root/Krpc-all/Krpc/thirdparty/muduo-cpp17/lib ../../../lib/libkrpc_core.a -lprotobuf -lpthread -lzookeeper_mt -lmuduo_core -lglog
